subcodes.first_line: The Book from Our presence unto her who bore him who arose to serve his Lord and entered prison twice. Blessed is she [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب من لدنا الی التی حملت من قام علی خدمه مولیه و ورد السجن مرتین طوبی للتی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
